text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At her insistence, I visit the office of<n>the
mysterious producer Light Hello.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So, umm... the "Grand Concert," was<n>it?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it was an annual concert where<n>every Tracen
student got the chance<n>to be on stage.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
One by one, they sang their feelings<n>of gratitude
out to their fans.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: A concert featuring every student?!That sounds like a dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I want in! We're doing it, right?!
choice_data_list: Wait, so why'd it go away?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Well, probably because the Twinkle<n>Series has
grown a lot since then.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
With so many more races and<n>registered runners,
there just wasn't<n>enough room for everyone in
the<n>Grand Concert anymore.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
It started out as something the<n>Umamusume put
on themselves. But<n>as the event grew bigger,
preparing<n>for it took more time than they had to
spare.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
That's when the URA proposed the<n>idea of
winning concerts.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
The whole point of the Grand Concert<n>was to
express gratitude to fans, so<n>holding a concert
after every race<n>would be more efficient.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Plus, tying the concerts to races<n>meant that the
URA could manage<n>them, taking the burden off the
runners themselves.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts proved to be a hit,<n>more than the
Grand Concert ever<n>was.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
The promise of center stage<n>captivated runners,
both winners and<n>losers alike, and—most of
all—their<n>fans.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Everybody in racing was absolutely<n>enthralled...
so much so that they<n>forgot all about the Grand
Concert.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts now provide a<n>dream for all
Umamusume to chase,<n>and have elevated the
Twinkle Series<n>to greater prestige.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
And yet... I can't help but feel that it's<n>led some
runners to lose sight of the<n>concerts' original
purpose.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts are seen as a stage<n>for the
victors first and foremost.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
But just because you don't win, just<n>because
you're not center stage,<n>doesn't mean you can't
convey<n>gratitude to your fans.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I dunno about you, but I don't want to<n>get too
used to this dance. If I can get<n>through it with a
smile, it means I'll<n>never reach center stage.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
That's why we need the Grand<n>Concert now
more than ever.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I want to give Umamusume a place<n>where they
can simply convey their<n>gratitude to their fans,
without<n>worrying about anything else.
color_text_info_list: convey their gratitude to their fans

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Please, this would mean so much!

text_block_list.name: URA Director
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Times have changed, you<n>must
understand. I fail to see the<n>point in a reboot now
that winning<n>concerts have become the norm.

text_block_list.name: URA Director
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, a new event on the<n>calendar would
only put more stress<n>on the Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: URA Director
text_block_list.text:
Besides, we haven't received any<n>requests to
bring it back either...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
What if I gathered support from<n>people who
wanted to see it again?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
If voices hoping for a reboot fill the<n>academy halls,
will the board<n>reconsider?

text_block_list.name: URA Director
text_block_list.text:
...At the very least, we may give the<n>idea another
look.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
That's where things currently stand.<n>And so I've
called you here to ask<n>for your help.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...You have mine.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I want to make this happen! I justknow everyone would love achance to give back to their fans!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please! We need thisconcert!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if we need help from more people,<n>how about
we start a petition or do a<n>concert to get the word
out?
color_text_info_list: a concert to get the word out

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Like a promotion concert, almost?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I mean, before this, I'd never<n>even heard of
the Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I think we should start by letting<n>people know
what it is—a concert for<n>us to give thanks to our
fans!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Also, you know how when there's a<n>singer you
don't know at a concert,<n>and you're not really
invested at first,<n>but then you find yourself
listening<n>along?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, that happens because<n>there's
power in songs.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So if we just sing our hearts out to<n>them, I'm sure
more people will join<n>our cause!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Yes, I see...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I've gone ahead and booked a stage<n>for our
concert!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I couldn't get the stage<n>here, since
it's not a school event,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I did manage to rent the stage closest<n>to campus,
where there should be<n>plenty of foot traffic!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I've also contacted people who can<n>take care of
the sound and lights, so<n>as soon as everything's
set up, we'll<n>be good to go!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, this is so exciting! I need<n>to start
rehearsing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but first I need to figure out the<n>other dancers'
schedules, tell the<n>dance instructor, and think of a
setlist...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like it's starting to hit Smart<n>Falcon just
how much there is to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All that work would definitely be a bit
overwhelming.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait, really? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Well, if there's anything I can help<n>with, just let
me know! I'll do<n>everything I can!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Woo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, I now have to think about getting
<chrname> concert-ready in<n>addition to
her normal training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though from what I hear, there is<n>some overlap.
Dance and vocal<n>lessons, for example, often
involve<n>building a strong core.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Incorporating these lessons into our<n>schedule will
improve<n><chrname>'s abilities and set
her up for success on stage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Plus, concerts themselves may be<n>good
opportunities for<n><chrname> to grow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a brief chat, we decide to hold<n>our first
concert in late December.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we can make it a success, it'll be a<n>big first step
on our way to the Grand<n>Concert!
